info.name: Hobby SaaS API Acceptance
info.description: Deterministic client-level acceptance suite. Run only against the isolated acceptance Compose environment; it creates data and expects Free/Plus fixtures.

exec: const date = new Date(Date.UTC(now.getUTCFullYear(), now.getUTCMonth(), now.getUTCDate()));
pm.test("dynamic attributes come from template", () => pm.expect(body.map(item => item.key)).to.include('distance_km'));

item.name: Feature flags are authenticated and explicit
Free cannot update another user's equipment

exec: pm.test("only owned equipment is listed", () => { pm.expect(body).to.have.length(1); pm.expect(body[0].id).to.eql(pm.collectionVariables.get('freeEquipmentId')); });
pm.test("basic planning defaults are Free", () => { pm.expect(body.priority).to.eql('normal'); pm.expect(body.archived).to.eql(false); });
pm.test("advanced fields are persisted", () => { pm.expect(body.priority).to.eql('high'); pm.expect(body.position).to.eql(2); });

item.name: Free cannot update another user's backlog item

exec: pm.test("Plus item is listed", () => pm.expect(body.some(item => item.id === pm.collectionVariables.get('plusBacklogId'))).to.eql(true));

pm.test("session relations and visibility are returned", () => { pm.expect(body.visibility).to.eql('only_me'); pm.expect(body.projectId).to.eql(pm.collectionVariables.get('freeBacklogId')); pm.expect(body.equipmentIds).to.include(pm.collectionVariables.get('freeEquipmentId')); });
pm.test("owner pagination contains private session", () => pm.expect(body.items.some(item => item.id === pm.collectionVariables.get('freeSessionId'))).to.eql(true));

item.name: Free cannot read Plus session through owner endpoint
Free reads Plus public profile without sensitive fields

exec: pm.test("everyone session is visible", () => pm.expect(body.items.some(item => item.id === pm.collectionVariables.get('plusSessionId'))).to.eql(true));

item.name: Free reads Plus public session detail
Plus cannot see Free private session

exec: pm.test("only_me session is absent", () => pm.expect(body.items.some(item => item.id === pm.collectionVariables.get('freeSessionId'))).to.eql(false));

item.name: Free plan is derived from database

exec: pm.test("Free has no active entitlement", () => { pm.expect(body.plan).to.eql('free'); pm.expect(body.active).to.eql(false); });

item.name: Plus plan is derived from fixture

exec: pm.test("Plus entitlement is active", () => { pm.expect(body.plan).to.eql('plus'); pm.expect(body.active).to.eql(true); });
pm.test("Free goal is basic weekly", () => { pm.expect(body.advanced).to.eql(false); pm.expect(body.progress).to.be.at.least(1); });

item.name: Second overlapping Free goal requires Plus

exec: pm.test("custom global goal is advanced", () => pm.expect(body.advanced).to.eql(true));
pm.test("created goal is listed", () => pm.expect(body.some(goal => goal.id === pm.collectionVariables.get('freeGoalId'))).to.eql(true));

pm.test("session generates XP and badge", () => { pm.expect(body.hobbies[0].xp).to.be.above(0); pm.expect(body.badges.some(badge => badge.key === 'first_session')).to.eql(true); pm.expect(body.records.longestSessionMinutes).to.eql(40); });

item.name: Plus customizes profile with earned badge

exec: pm.test("theme and owned badge are persisted", () => { pm.expect(body.theme).to.eql('forest'); pm.expect(body.featuredBadges).to.have.length(1); pm.expect(body.supporterBadge).to.eql(true); });
pm.test("usage is derived from linked session", () => pm.expect(body.usedMinutes).to.be.at.least(50));
pm.test("owned rule is listed", () => pm.expect(body.some(rule => rule.id === pm.collectionVariables.get('maintenanceRuleId'))).to.eql(true));

item.name: Free JSON export contains only own data

exec: pm.test("export is scoped and hides internal media keys", () => { pm.expect(serialized).to.include('acceptance-free-user'); pm.expect(serialized).not.to.include('acceptance-plus-user'); pm.expect(serialized).not.to.include('storageKey'); });

item.name: Free CSV export is safe and non-empty

exec: pm.test("CSV has header and own session", () => { pm.expect(pm.response.text()).to.include('started_at'); pm.expect(pm.response.text()).to.include('Private acceptance run updated'); });
